Hey claw - so im going to give you your own twitter/X Account. @Small_Claw_

I want you to go ahead and open X on my computer and create the first introduction post. Its logged in already
Got it. I’ll open X on your machine, post an introductory update for @Small_Claw_, and then report back with exactly what was published.
